title: SQL queries should retrieve only necessary fields
description: Fetching more fields than necessary in SQL queries can lead to performance issues and unnecessary data transfer. Always select only the fields required for your application logic.
recommendation: Review all SQL queries and ensure that only the required columns are selected instead of using 'SELECT *'.
impact: Improves application performance and reduces memory usage by avoiding unnecessary data retrieval.

checks.message: Review all SQL queries and ensure that only the required columns are selected instead of using 'SELECT *'.
